sp: 3.1.1. Compare and contrast living things and non-living things based on the following characteristics: (i) breathe; (ii) need food and water; (iii) move; (iv) grow; (v) reproduce.
3.1.2. Arrange in sequence the examples of living things based on their sizes
3.2.1 State the basic needs of living things i.e. food, water and air.
3.2.2 Describe human, animals and plants need food, water and air in different ways.
3.2.3. Describe human and animals also need shelters.
3.2.4. Provide reasoning on the importance of food, water, air and shelter to human and animals.
objektif: Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat Compare and contrast living things and non-living things based on the following characteristics: (i) breathe; (ii) need food and water; (iii) move; (iv) grow; (v) reproduce. dengan betul.

Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat Compare and contrast living things and non-living things based on the following characteristics: (i) breathe; (ii) need food and water; (iii) move; (iv) grow; (v) reproduce. dengan bimbingan guru.

6.1.3. Make generalisation that different plants may have same parts.
